## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pnpm test` is green
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` are green
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-visible change
- [ ] If output bytes changed: goldens re-baselined in this PR + rationale below
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `AGENTS.md`) if a decision or workflow changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits; no AI attribution; no external repo/project names
